/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/resnet32_cifar-OT.dir/main_resnet32_cifar.cpp.o  -o ../bin/resnet32_cifar-OT ../lib/libSCI-OT.a ../lib/libSCI-LinearOT.a ../lib/libSCI-GC.a ../lib/libSCI-Math.a ../lib/libSCI-BuildingBlocks.a ../lib/libSCI-FloatingPoint.a ../lib/libSCI-OT.a ../lib/libSCI-LinearOT.a ../lib/libSCI-GC.a ../lib/libSCI-Math.a ../lib/libSCI-BuildingBlocks.a ../lib/libSCI-FloatingPoint.a -pthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/9/libgomp.so -lpthread
